We need to choose decisions that minimize the expected cost.  
Given \(P(x_1)=0.8\), \(P(x_2)=0.2\), and costs \(c(d_1/x_2)=2c\), \(c(d_2/x_1)=c\).  

For \(y_1\):  
\(P(x_1/y_1) \propto 0.8 \times 0.8 = 0.64\), \(P(x_2/y_1) \propto 0.2 \times 0.4 = 0.08\).  
Cost of \(d_1\): \(0.08 \times 2c = 0.16c\); cost of \(d_2\): \(0.64 \times c = 0.64c\). Choose \(d_1\).
